home_page.title: Gym in Vilnius
home_page.subTitle: Gym access is unlimited
home_page.sectionOptionsParagraph: At The SkyGym, we believe that everyone has the potential to transform their life through fitness. Since 2003, we've been helping people of all fitness levels achieve their goals in a supportive, motivating environment.
home_page.optionNoContractsText: Pay for a month, train for a month. No strings attached.
home_page.optionUnlimitedAccessText: Your workout shouldn't have a stopwatch. Train as long as you need.
home_page.optionCoachingText: Direct access to a champion-level trainer for plans or personal sessions.
home_page.servicePowerDesc: Build muscle and increase strength with our comprehensive weight training programs and state-of-the-art equipment.
home_page.serviceGymnasticsDesc: Flexibility, coordination and functional movement exercises suitable for all levels.
home_page.serviceCardioDesc: Modern cardio equipment to strengthen your heart and burn calories.

footer.description: Your strength starts here. Modern gym equipment, expert trainers, and unbeatable atmosphere.
